title: About Us
welcome: Welcome to {brand} – Luma Spa – Your private sanctuary of relaxation
description_1: Pamper yourself and discover a sense of rebirth at Luma Spa through our specialized services ranging from hair washes, massages, and facials to other wellness therapies. Our private, serene space and skilled technicians ensure a fully personalized experience.
description_2: We are committed to accompanying you on your journey of health and beauty, aiming to make every visit to Luma Spa not just a treatment session, but a deep and lasting connection.
footer_text: Step into a world of tranquility – where the journey of recovery and self-love begins.

image_alt_3: Full view of Luma Spa building

seo.title: About Luma Spa | Professional Foot & Body Massage in Da Nang
seo.description: Discover the story of Luma Spa - an exquisite relaxation space in Da Nang, specializing in energy recovery and holistic wellness.

hero.title2: but a journey of energy recovery
hero.description: Luma Spa offers a Foot & Body care experience in a warm, sophisticated, and professional style. We believe a relaxed body is the foundation of a balanced mind.

about.label: About Us
about.title: A gentle and sophisticated body care space
about.paragraph1: At Luma Spa, we focus on a comprehensive relaxation experience with foot massage, body massage, and energy recovery treatments. Each session is designed to help clients reduce stress, improve circulation, and restore balance.
about.paragraph2: The spa space is designed to be cozy with pleasant scents, a dedicated team of technicians, and professional service processes to bring a sense of relaxation from the very first experience.

section.label: Business Values
section.title: Core Values & Mission of Luma Spa

coreValues.label: Core Values
coreValues.title: The foundation that creates a distinct experience

dedication.title: Dedication
dedication.desc: Caring for every client with thoughtfulness, gentleness, and understanding.

mission.label: Mission
mission.title: Bringing balance to body and mind
mission.paragraph1: Luma Spa is the place that helps you relax after the pressures of life.
mission.paragraph2: Providing quality massage treatments to help recover energy and improve health.
mission.paragraph3: Not just beauty, but a space for healing and emotional regeneration.
